common.sync_all_aria: Sync all repositories with GitHub now

layout.footer_manifest: Repository metrics without noise. Neobrutalist stack. Raw data only—no soft shadows.
layout.sync_modal_help: Enter the same value as GGHSTATS_API_TOKEN on the server. Sent as header x-api-token and stored in this browser only (sessionStorage).

index.title: Repositories
index.chart_blurb: Daily clone counts (GitHub traffic) summed across every repository in the current list and search filter — not only this page. Window: up to the last 120 days with data.
index.chart_empty: No clone history for this list yet. Run gghstats fetch to collect traffic.

h2h.title: Head to Head (H2H)
h2h.intro: Compare two repositories for the selected interval. Large numbers are H2H shares for this pair only (they sum to 100, not counts from GitHub).
h2h.score_help_title: How the H2H score is calculated
h2h.help_p1: Each metric row uses the raw values in the table below. For that row only:
h2h.help_formula_share: share_A = value_A ÷ (value_A + value_B) · share_B = 1 − share_A (50/50 if both are zero)
h2h.help_p2: The headline score is the weighted sum of those shares, scaled to 0–100 and rounded:
h2h.help_w_7d: 7 days — Clones (7d) 50%, Views (7d) 30%, Momentum (7d vs previous 7d) 20%
h2h.help_w_30d: 30 days — Clones (30d) 50%, Views (30d) 30%, Momentum (30d vs previous 30d) 20%
h2h.help_w_total: All time — Total clones 50%, Total views 50% (no momentum)
h2h.help_momentum_def: Momentum is clone growth: (clones in the window − clones in the prior window) ÷ max(prior window clones, 1). The table shows it as a percentage (×100).
h2h.momentum_extreme_help: Very high momentum (e.g. thousands of %) is expected, not a calculation bug: the prior window had few or zero clones and the current window has a recent spike. Example: 819 clones this period vs ~0 last period → about (819 ÷ 1) × 100 ≈ 81,900%. That means "traffic jumped from almost nothing," not "819× better than the other repo." After more stable history, momentum usually moves to ordinary ranges (tens of %).
h2h.help_lead_pts: Lead X pts is the gap vs the leader: |score_A − score_B| ÷ max(score) × 100. It is not "repo B has X% more clones than A".
h2h.chart_momentum_footnote: Rolling clone momentum from daily clones (missing days = 0). Each repo uses its own axis (left = A, right = B). Extreme % after a first spike with little prior traffic is normal — see How the H2H score is calculated above.
h2h.err_invalid_repos: Enter valid owner/repo for both repositories.
h2h.err_not_found: One or both repositories were not found in the database. Sync them first.
h2h.suggest_close: Scores are too close to call a winner yet.
h2h.suggest_overall: {{repo}} leads overall (H2H score) — strong candidate for winner.
h2h.suggest_clones: {{repo}} leads on {{metric}} with a clear gap — strong candidate for winner.
h2h.suggest_views: {{repo}} leads on {{metric}} — strong candidate for winner.

repo.embed_blurb: Counts reflect data stored on this gghstats instance; they update after sync.

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.heading: Page not found
not_found.detail: The requested page does not exist, or the URL may be incorrect.
not_found.repo_detail: This repository is not in the database. Check the name or run a sync so it is collected.
